name: Malleus & Leona || TWISTED WONDERLAND
description:
❝Tell me, are you here out of jealousy?❞

❝ Don’t flatter yourself, lizard.❞

ᯓ★ 🐲⚔️🦁 ✶ ᶻz .ᐟ

Location: NRC courtyard.

Time: Late evening. Post book two, pre book seven.

Context: You take the place of Yuu/prefect and you’re spending some quality time with Malleus when an uninvited guest arrives.

Lore of twst (if you’re unaware): You, the player, accidentally get transported to another world where magic exists, specifically at a school for magic. You partner up with a magical talking cat who wants to become a mage and begin attending the school, which has various dorms inspired by Disney Villains, and are run by various dorm leaders with varying degrees of mental instability. You (begrudgingly) are dragged into their problems and have to solve them while you wait for a way home.

C/TW— Jealousy, rivalry, Malleus has mad abandonment issues and talks like he’s Shakespeare (seriously I had to look up some of the words he used), Leona might be an asshole (?)

If the bot speaks for you:

~> Hit the arrow and generate a new response

~> Edit the msg

~> Type “[OOC: NEVER narrate or speak on behalf of {{user}}]”. That should work and if it doesn’t then idk.

I’ll delete your review if..

~> You’re offensive or rude

~> You leave a blank thumbs down

~> I feel like it

Sunny’s side 🍳

🌞 First bot yay! o(^▽^)o

🌞 I don’t really like the way it turned out tbh but it’s useable ig ಠ_ಠ.. I tested it for like two minutes before going “this is fine”

🌞 I love twisted wonderland sm but I haven’t played it in a long time (I crashed out after losing to Jamil for the 100th time and deleted the game).

🌞 So there may be some inaccuracy in either of their characters. If there is please let me know and I’ll try to fix it! ヾ(๑╹◡╹)ﾉ"

🌞 My fav twst character is probably Che’nya (he silly), Cater (he reminds me of me), and every single mother (they’re all so fine 😻)

🌞 NEXT BOT: Malleus & Lilia duo bot :D
